remember: Recall and identify different types of network attacks (malicious code, denial of service, man-in-the-middle, etc.)
Identify and explain network security threats and vulnerabilities
Name and describe various security devices (firewalls, intrusion detection systems, etc.)
understand: Understand the concepts of threat models, risk assessment, and mitigation strategies
Describe the importance of encryption and decryption in network security
Explain the working of secure communication protocols (TLS, SSL, etc.)
apply: Apply threat modeling techniques to identify potential security threats
Design and implement secure network architecture
Configure and manage network security devices and protocols
analyze: Analyze network traffic to identify potential security threats
Evaluate the effectiveness of security measures in place
Recommend improvements to network security based on analysis

ncert_objectives: Understand the security threats and attacks that can occur in a network.
Be able to explain the concept of risk assessment and threat modeling.
Understand the need for encryption in network security.
Be able to explain the importance of secure communication protocols in network security.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and explain different types of network attacks and security threats.
Describe the importance of encryption, decryption, and secure communication protocols in network security.
Explain the role of security devices and protocols in network security.
Apply threat modeling techniques to identify potential security threats and design secure network architectures.
